# DATPAQ Image Processing API Sample

This repository contains a production-ready SPA that demonstrates how to call the DATPAQ Image Processing API.

## Primary resources
- Human docs: https://www.datpaq.com/docs/image-processing
- API base URL: https://datpaq.com/api
- API route used by this sample: /v1/image-processing
- OpenAI machine-readable docs: /openai.json
- Expanded LLM guidance: /llms-full.txt

## What this app demonstrates
- Required API key input with `x-api-key` header auth.
- Query-driven image processing inputs (`image`, `image_url`, `format`, `x`, `y`, `width`, `height`, `quality`).
- Operation profiles for convert, resize, compress, and crop validation.
- Loading, error, empty, and success response states.
- Copyable request URL and copyable JSON response block.

## Query contract (GET /v1/image-processing)
- Required auth: `x-api-key` header
- Required image source: one of `image` or `image_url`
- Optional processing parameters: `format`, `x`, `y`, `width`, `height`, `quality`

## Output contract
- Responses are rendered as JSON when available.
- The app attempts to detect image preview URLs or base64 output when present.
